headline.purpose: Authoritative page identity without marketing scale.

title.purpose: Clear local hierarchy across panels and tables.

label.purpose: Metadata, field labels, and compact navigation.

shadows.name: surface
shadows.purpose: Quiet separation for primary working surfaces.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single high-emphasis action in a local region.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A quiet supporting action with a crisp boundary.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: A comfortable 40px field with a visible, restrained focus state.
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;gap:6px;color:#34413C;font:600 12px/1.35 'Avenir Next','Segoe UI',sans-serif}.ds-field input{height:40px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid #DDE4DF;border-radius:9px;background:#fff;color:#17201D;font:450 14px/1.4 'Avenir Next','Segoe UI',sans-serif}.ds-field input::placeholder{color:#7D8983}.ds-field input:hover{border-color:#C5CEC8}.ds-field input:focus{outline:0;border-color:#1B6A59;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(27,106,89,.12)}

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: A compact dark-rail navigation row with a tonal selected state.

components.name: Surface Panel
components.description: The default working surface: quiet, borderless, and structurally elevated.
components.html:
Active project status

Operational content lives here.

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: A compact semantic label with a squared, non-pill silhouette.

narrative.overview: A beautifully maintained operating ledger for a respected architecture studio: exact, calm, practical, and considered. Refinement comes from disciplined spacing, typography, and information density rather than ornamental UI.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained spruce accent on neutral working surfaces
Strong typographic hierarchy and tabular numerals
Comfortable 8px-grid spacing with compact data regions

rules.name: The One-Marker Rule
rules.body: Studio Spruce is reserved for action, selection, and focus.

rules.name: The State-Is-Meaning Rule
rules.body: Semantic colors communicate real status only.

rules.name: The Quiet Headline Rule
rules.body: Page titles establish authority without becoming hero typography.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: A surface must earn elevation by floating, moving, or requiring temporary focus.

dos: Do use the 8px grid and optical adjustments where needed.
Do use whitespace, dividers, and type before adding a container.
Do make tables scannable and numeric columns tabular.
Do provide complete interaction and feedback states.
donts: Don't use generic bordered card grids or nested containers.
Don't use purple-blue startup gradients or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't use excessive pills, oversized radii, or ghost cards.
Don't trade familiar product affordances for novelty.
